allow: PowerShell($zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path 'ctp-job-cards-docs-2026-05-18.zip'\).Path\); $zip.Entries | Group-Object { [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension\($_.Name\) } | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { '{0,-6} {1,3} files' -f $_.Name, $_.Count }; $zip.Dispose\(\))
